situational_context: Structured rebuild week 2. Chronic load at 18 (~1.1% of 2023 peak 1608), marginally up from bootstrap. Activity pattern: ebike commuting on sur site days (suffer 8-12/leg, ~15-21 daily load) plus occasional Zwift sessions. Today's readiness is exceptional (training readiness 97, body battery 59, RHR 48). HRV stable at 36 (7d avg, balanced). Autonomic system strongly supports load increase — constraint remains schedule (young infant, work commute). 2 sur site days next week (Tue, Thu) with expected ebike commute. Weekend training both days planned. Rebuild bias: aerobic Z1-Z2, progressive volume.

recommendations.text: Execute today's Zwift Z2 session and this weekend's outdoor sessions — target 4 dedicated sessions this week to build training consistency beyond commute rides
recommendations.measurable: ≥3 dedicated training sessions completed Apr 24-30, acute load maintained ≥17

recommendations.text: Maintain sleep consistency — target ≥7h every night, especially the night before Saturday's outdoor ride
recommendations.measurable: 0 nights below 6.5h sleep in the next 7 days
